cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this ball-swapping problem. So there are five players: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored ball. The initial setup is: - Alice: black ball - Bob: brown ball - Claire: blue ball - Dave: white ball - Eve: green ball Then there are a series of swaps between pairs of players. The question is asking who ends up with which ball after all the swaps. Specifically, it's asking which ball Alice has at the end. Let me track the ball each person has after each swap. Starting with the initial state: A: black
